title: Select and establish an apiary site
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Select and establish an apiary site demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan to select and establish an apiary site

pcs.text: Establish and prioritise criteria for selecting a site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish and prioritise criteria for selecting a site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish and prioritise criteria for selecting a site.

pcs.text: Identify suitable locality in which to search for site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify suitable locality in which to search for site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify suitable locality in which to search for site.

pcs.text: Identify appropriate certificates and permits required for moving and establishing an apiary site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify appropriate certificates and permits required for moving and establishing an apiary site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify appropriate certificates and permits required for moving and establishing an apiary site.

pcs.text: Gather and analyse information for potential sites in selected locality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Gather and analyse information for potential sites in selected locality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Gather and analyse information for potential sites in selected locality.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan to select and establish an apiary site

elements.title: Select the apiary site

pcs.text: Analyse data collected and select suitable site according to criteria
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse data collected and select suitable site according to criteria?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse data collected and select suitable site according to criteria.

pcs.text: Determine capacity of available flora to support desired number of hives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine capacity of available flora to support desired number of hives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine capacity of available flora to support desired number of hives.

pcs.text: Prepare a plan to establish an apiary at the selected site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare a plan to establish an apiary at the selected site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a plan to establish an apiary at the selected site.

pcs.text: Select precise areas to establish an apiary within the site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select precise areas to establish an apiary within the site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select precise areas to establish an apiary within the site.

pcs.text: Ensure appropriate permissions and certificates are obtained prior to locating apiary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure appropriate permissions and certificates are obtained prior to locating apiary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure appropriate permissions and certificates are obtained prior to locating apiary.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Select the apiary site

elements.title: Establish the apiary at the selected site

pcs.text: Identify health and safety, biosecurity and food safety hazards and risks and implement controls for establishing suitable apiary sites
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety, biosecurity and food safety hazards and risks and implement controls for establishing suitable apiary sites?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety, biosecurity and food safety hazards and risks and implement controls for establishing suitable apiary sites.

pcs.text: Select, fit and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Select tools and equipment required and ensure serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select tools and equipment required and ensure serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools and equipment required and ensure serviceability.

pcs.text: Transport hives to apiary site according to workplace procedures, legislative requirements and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transport hives to apiary site according to workplace procedures, legislative requirements and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transport hives to apiary site according to workplace procedures, legislative requirements and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Locate hives on site according to site establishment plan and safe handling procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate hives on site according to site establishment plan and safe handling procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate hives on site according to site establishment plan and safe handling procedures.

pcs.text: Observe and record access of bees to floral sources and water and effect on colony strength and production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe and record access of bees to floral sources and water and effect on colony strength and production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe and record access of bees to floral sources and water and effect on colony strength and production.

pcs.text: Monitor the suitability of the site and reposition hives according to honey production and bee activity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor the suitability of the site and reposition hives according to honey production and bee activity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor the suitability of the site and reposition hives according to honey production and bee activity.

pcs.text: Record results of inspections and any remedial action according to biosecurity and production procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record results of inspections and any remedial action according to biosecurity and production procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record results of inspections and any remedial action according to biosecurity and production procedures.
